text.title: Scope Creep Parking Lot Protocol Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the scope-creep-parking-lot-protocol methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale and is referenced from `content/06-decision-tree.xml`.

rule.statement: Step 1 (pre meeting setup): Open visible parking-lot canvas; brief participants on protocol.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the pre meeting setup gate.

rule.statement: Step 2 (live capture): Capture every ask verbatim with requester + timestamp.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the live capture gate.

rule.statement: Step 3 (post meeting triage): Within 24h, route each item through scope-change-vs-scope-creep classifier.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the post meeting triage gate.

rule.statement: Step 4 (respond and route): Send 48h response per item; open change-control records as needed.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the respond and route gate.

rule.statement: Step 5 (audit weekly): Weekly rollup of counts + ageing; surface SLA breaches.
rule.rationale: Skipping or reordering this step breaks the methodology's invariants; it is the audit weekly gate.

rule.statement: When ask_rate > 0 AND audit_required == true, do: Run protocol with verbatim capture + visible canvas.
rule.rationale: Codified from the decision-tree verdict; this rule binds the gate condition to a concrete, testable action so the routing remains auditable.

rule.statement: When default, do: Capture only; never classify scope live.
rule.rationale: Codified from the decision-tree verdict; this rule binds the gate condition to a concrete, testable action so the routing remains auditable.

rule.statement: When contract_managed == true, do: Enforce 24h triage + 48h response SLAs; ageing alerts to PM.
rule.rationale: Codified from the decision-tree verdict; this rule binds the gate condition to a concrete, testable action so the routing remains auditable.

rule.statement: When session_format == demo_or_review, do: Canvas must be visible during meeting; private notes forbidden.
rule.rationale: Codified from the decision-tree verdict; this rule binds the gate condition to a concrete, testable action so the routing remains auditable.

rule.statement: If preconditions for scope-creep-parking-lot-protocol do not hold, do not apply this methodology; route to an alternative as the decision tree suggests.
rule.rationale: Methodologies misapplied to wrong contexts create overhead without value; explicit skip preserves the agent's budget.
